news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

holdings.infoBox: MUYY is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST MU ETF (MUYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Micron Technology, Inc. (MU) MUYY was launched on Apr 14, 2026 and is issued by GraniteShares.

data.title: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
data.text: New York, June 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- GraniteShares today announced the weekly distributions for its GraniteShares YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HO...
